name: com.timskap.unityscad
description: Import parametric .scad files as Unity meshes. Customizer-style parameter parsing, real-time Live Preview window, per-color submeshes, disk-backed compile cache, URP/HDRP/Built-in material compatibility. Requires OpenSCAD (auto-install available).

samples.description: Simple .scad exercising all supported Customizer parameter types.
